message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array of three objects. For each question we must provide "question": "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure". Provide feedback with text that highlights problems. So for question 1: Does the text list the main sections? No. So fails. Provide feedback: mention missing list, no sections listed. Complies false.

Question 2: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. So fails.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood general structure just from this text? No. So fails.

Thus all three false. Provide feedback for each. Keep JSON.
